title: Two Indian Ships Fired at by Iranian Navy in Hormuz
description: Confusion prevailed in the Strait after Iran on Saturday reversed its reopening of the Strait. The US military said it has forced 23 ships to turn around near the Strait of Hormuz since it imposed a naval blockade of Iranian ports. Iran's joint military command said Saturday that "control of the Strait of Hormuz has returned to its previous state ... Under strict management and control of the armed forces."
